result: The R script was executed successfully. The cleaned data file was created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with exactly 5 variables (NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, educdtlpa) and 15760 rows. The script loaded the three wave files (wave_one, wave_two, wave_four), consolidated parental education variables across waves by prioritizing positive values (1-20) from earliest wave then negative values, mapped detailed education to collapsed NVQ-equivalent categories, and created labelled factor variables with proper value labels for missing codes.
